level_signals: Expected to present to C-level leadership
Owns multi-year roadmap and cross-functional strategy

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree or higher with a technical discipline
Previous experience leading Platform and/or MarTech cross functional teams
Technical savvy with marketing systems and ability to partner closely with marketing leadership
Full stack "operator": ability to both create and execute the business and product strategy; with clear objectives, but limited, ambiguous, or varied direction
Ability to operate cross-functionally, leading and influencing colleagues, and ultimately leading to timely tactical decision making to advance our objectives
Flexible and collaborative approach to problem solving and ideation in a highly ambiguous environment
Superior communication skills, both written and verbal, along with experience presenting to C-level leadership!
Data-driven approach and excellent analytical skills
Passion for your customers! You do right by them, always

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska (due to insurance coverage issues)

scope.surface: Ad tech and ads measurement platforms at SoFi; marketing and ads technology powering member acquisition, engagement, and retention
scope.business_model: B2C financial services / national bank; internal adtech/martech platform serving marketing and business units
core_responsibilities: Own and define the vision, strategy and product roadmap for ad tech and ads measurement platforms at SoFi
Identify leapfrog product features, leveraging forward thinking technology, data, tools (including ML or AI) and industry best practices
Create and evangelize a product vision and own a multi-year product roadmap, including prioritizing and driving backlogs for launch with your dedicated engineering teams
Communicate the vision, strategy, execution plan and customer impact/learnings to all stakeholders including the highest levels of leadership in the company
Collaborate closely with the full cross-functional team for your line of business & initiatives, to help execute on the strategic vision

green_flags: Principal-level title signals senior IC scope and compensation
Clear product surface ownership (ad tech and measurement platforms)
Role described as 'central to the success of SoFi's goals' — high visibility and impact
Cross-functional scope with direct access to C-level leadership
EEO and San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance commitments stated
red_flags: Compensation range not disclosed — JD says range 'is listed below' but no numbers appear in the provided content
Location type is entirely unclear — no city, no remote/hybrid policy stated (only Hawaii/Alaska exclusion mentioned)
Visa sponsorship not mentioned at all
No 'nice to have' or 'preferred' qualifications listed — all requirements treated as hard, leaving little nuance

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'Principal' title, 8+ years, and C-level presentation expectation)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description as B2C financial services / national bank with internal adtech platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from Hawaii/Alaska exclusion implying remote is otherwise available)

ambiguities: Compensation: JD states 'The base pay range for this role is listed below' but no actual numbers are present in the provided JD content — likely truncated or a rendering issue.

Location type: No city, office, or remote/hybrid policy is stated in the role body. The only location signal is exclusion of Hawaii and Alaska for remote work, suggesting remote is generally available but this is not confirmed explicitly.
All 'What you'll need' bullets are unconditional; none are labeled as preferred or bonus. All treated as hard severity per extraction rules.
